zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermentrude Talbot於1200年出生在英國林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛時，她的父親Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I35歲，母親Ermentrude de Ferrers36歲。她於1215年與Henry FitzGerrold在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Ermentrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, adopted from Old French by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It is derived from erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’ + traut ‘beloved’. It did not survive long into the Middle Ages, but was occasionally revived in the 18th and 19th centuries. It is now completely out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermentrude Talbot was born in 1200, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I, was 35 and her mother, Ermentrude de Ferrers, was 36. She married Henry FitzGerrold in 1215, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1242, at the age of 42.

Elle a épousé Henry FitzGerrold en 1215, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1242, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermentrude Talbotが1200年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウで生まれた時，父Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot Iは35歳，母Ermentrude de Ferrersは36歳であった。1215年にイギリスイギリスでHenry FitzGerroldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermentrude Talbot(이)가 1200년 영국 링코실르 게인스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert ‘Quinton’ de Talbot I(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermentrude de Ferrers(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Henry FitzGerrold(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.
